creator: co9co9@gmail.com
text:
Edwin, Pedro,

I have tested Pedro's patch on my 5.5-RELEASE system and everything seems to
work fine. So, I hereby approve the patch. Thanks Pedro!

Regards,

Robin Schilham

On Mon, 10 Dec 2007 15:50:07 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of math/clp,
>
> Please note that PR ports/118532 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118532
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
